findings.note: Byte-identity is asserted between the sed/.NET normalization replicas, not the twin binaries themselves (the twins expose no normal-form CLI). Mitigated: case_expect drives the real twins and asserts exit-status + rule-ID parity, so any twin-level normalization divergence would surface as a decision-parity failure.

AC-004 run-all registration is confirmed only by 'grep -q second-approval-mask\.tests\.sh tests/run-all.sh'; tests/run-all.sh is not included in the bundle for independent confirmation and the grep would also match a commented/inactive line.
